title: Uniting Financial Services subscribes to Infosys Finacle Digital Banking SaaS Suite on AWS Cloud
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys, announced a collaboration with Uniting Financial Services in Australia to implement the next-generation Finacle Digital Banking Suite as a SaaS offering on AWS cloud. UFS migrated from its incumbent platform to Finacle SaaS in less than five months, using the Finacle Australian Reference Bank Model. The deployment includes core banking, digital engagement, online banking, mobile banking, customer data, and alerts capabilities. Infosys stated the collaboration will help UFS enhance agility, compliance, operational efficiency, digital customer experience, product expansion, partner connectivity through open APIs, and cloud-native scalability and resilience.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Finacle announced a collaboration with Uniting Financial Services in Australia to implement the next-gen Finacle Digital Banking Suite.
UFS moved from its incumbent platform to Finacle Software-as-a-Service on AWS cloud in less than five months.
The implementation was enabled by the Finacle Australian Reference Bank Model, described as a solution with preconfigured products, processes, interfaces, and compliance rules.
The implemented suite includes Finacle Core Banking, Finacle Digital Engagement Hub, Finacle Online Banking, Finacle Mobile Banking, Finacle Customer Data Hub, and Finacle Alerts.
Infosys stated the collaboration will help UFS enhance business agility, compliance, operational efficiency, digital customer experience, faster product launches, and scalability.
The Finacle SaaS environment uses AWS cloud infrastructure, including Amazon RDS, Amazon EKS, and AWS WAF.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Uniting Financial Services subscribed to Infosys Finacle's Digital Banking SaaS Suite on AWS Cloud to modernise its core banking and digital capabilities.
